deviceDescription: Simple. Predictable. Precise.The market leading EverFlexTM stent†offers precision, strength, and flexibility. Delivered by the physician-inspired EntrustTM delivery system, it offers a 5 Fr low profile, 0.035" guidewire compatibility, triaxial design, and 150 cm catheter lengths. Medtronic also offers a traditional 6 Fr pin-pull delivery system.
